MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF G3 ENTERPRISES, INC.S MOTION TO COMPEL BASADORA, LLC'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND (TRANSACTION ID # 100017784) FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT G3 ENTERPRISES, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-11-2016 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, G3 ENTERPRISES, INC.'S MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT WILL WITHIN FOURTEEN (14) DAYS OF THIS ORDER SERVE WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO G3 ENTERPRISE'S FORM INTERROGATORIES AND WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO G3 ENTERPRISE'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT WILL WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS SERVE WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONES TO G3 ENTERPRISE'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSION; IF DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINT FAILS TO DO SO WITHIN THE TIME SPECIFIED, ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,676.30 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST DEFENDANTAND CROSS-COMPLAINANT CONSISTING OF $2,500.00 IN ATTORNEYS' FEES AND 157.63 IN COSTS. PAYMENT IS TO BE MADE TO PLAINTIFF AND CROSS COMPLAINANT WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF G3 ENTERPRISES, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BASADORA, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $288,339.96 PRINCIPAL, $31,618.16 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $319,958.12

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. CROSS DEFENDANT G3 ENTERPRISES, INC.'s Motion TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSE AND SANCTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT WILL WITHIN FOURTEEN (14) DAYS OF THIS ORDER SERVE WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO G3 ENTERPRISE'S FORM INTERROGATORIES AND WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO G3 ENTERPRISE'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT WILL WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS SERVE WITHOUT OBJECTION FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONES TO G3 ENTERPRISE'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSION; IF DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINT FAILS TO DO SO WITHIN THE TIME SPECIFIED, ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,676.30 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST DEFENDANTAND CROSS-COMPLAINANT CONSISTING OF $2,500.00 IN ATTORNEYS' FEES AND 157.63 IN COSTS. PAYMENT IS TO BE MADE TO PLAINTIFF AND CROSS COMPLAINANT WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS OF THIS ORDER. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear. Matter discussed by the Court and counsel, and submitted by counsel.
